name: Jupiter Mines Limited.
analysis: JMS has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$0.2734. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$0.2735 where 6 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$0.2734, stop A$0.2525, target A$0.2750. Risk/reward is 0.08:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
